name: ICE Enforcement in Dover
description: ICE conducts a workplace enforcement operation at a Dover restaurant, detaining 3 undocumented workers. Community members report increased fear and reduced foot traffic on Blackwell Street.
expected_impact: Dover agents shift strongly toward Mejia on immigration. Randolph agents may shift toward Hathaway on 'law and order'. Parsippany split. Montclair outraged.

name: Healthcare Premiums Increase 20%
description: New Jersey insurance commissioner announces that ACA marketplace premiums will increase by 20% next quarter due to the removal of enhanced subsidies in the One Big Beautiful Bill.
expected_impact: Strong shift toward Mejia across Dover and Montclair. Parsippany healthcare workers galvanized. Randolph concerned about costs but split on solution.

name: Major Employer Announces Parsippany Layoffs
description: A major pharmaceutical company headquartered in Parsippany announces 500 layoffs, citing federal regulatory uncertainty. Ripple effects expected across Morris County.
expected_impact: Parsippany agents deeply anxious. Hathaway gains on pro-business platform. Dover worried about downstream effects. Randolph finance professionals concerned.

name: Hathaway Reverses Gateway Tunnel Position
description: Joe Hathaway announces he can no longer support the Gateway Tunnel project, citing cost overruns. This reverses his previous pro-Gateway stance shared with Mejia.
expected_impact: NJ Transit commuters in all towns shift toward Mejia. Randolph commuters especially affected. Montclair transit-dependent residents alarmed.

name: Morris County School Funding Cuts
description: New Jersey announces a 15% reduction in state aid to Morris County school districts, effective next fiscal year. Randolph and Parsippany schools expected to be hardest hit.
expected_impact: Parents in Randolph and Parsippany shift focus to education. Undecided suburban parents may break toward whichever candidate addresses this. Dover less affected.

name: Mejia Endorses Statewide Rent Control
description: Analilia Mejia announces support for statewide rent control legislation, capping annual increases at 3%. Landlord associations immediately condemn the proposal.
expected_impact: Renters in Dover and Montclair rally to Mejia. Property owners in Randolph and Parsippany push toward Hathaway. Sharp class divide visible.

name: Trump Endorses Hathaway
description: Former President Trump posts on Truth Social endorsing Joe Hathaway, calling him 'a great young Republican who will fight for New Jersey.' Hathaway's campaign has not yet responded.
expected_impact: Polarizing. Strengthens Hathaway with base Republicans in Randolph. Pushes unaffiliated voters in Montclair and Parsippany away. Dover largely indifferent to national politics.

name: Dover Restaurant Wins Regional Award
description: La Finca, Carlos Restrepo's Colombian restaurant on Blackwell Street, wins 'Best New Jersey Restaurant' from NJ Monthly magazine. National media picks up the story as a symbol of immigrant entrepreneurship.
expected_impact: Positive community sentiment in Dover. Humanizes immigrant story across all towns. Subtle pro-Mejia effect as narrative aligns with her immigration stance.
